name: hyperv-platform
description: Plataforma de acesso remoto via máquinas virtuais Hyper-V

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm run install:shared && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules shared/node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules hyper-v-agent/node_modules

author: Hyper-V Platform Team
